Name: Foxhound
Tagline: Fluent query DSL generating dialect-specific queries for MySQL, MSSQL, SQLite, ALASQL, and MongoDB

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">

			<clipPath id="frame-foxhound-filled-light">

			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#b69d35"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-foxhound-filled-light)"><path d="M 48.00,12.00 L 79.18,30.00 L 79.18,66.00 L 48.00,84.00 L 16.82,66.00 L 16.82,30.00 Z" fill="#70c0b6"/>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="24" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="56" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">F</text>
	</svg>
